disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute crop of multiple painful mouth ulcers over 48 hours, markedly worse today, causing severe pain on swallowing
trigger_question_examples: What's been happening with your mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About two days ago a couple of ulcers came up, and today my whole mouth is covered in them. It hurts so much I can barely swallow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent episodes of mouth ulcers over a long period, never this severe
trigger_question_examples: Have you had mouth ulcers before?
Is this the first time this has happened?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get mouth ulcers on and off, they're a regular thing for me, but I've never had this many or this bad at once.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to tolerate any oral fluids for the past 12 hours because of pain
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to drink anything?
When did you last manage some fluids?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't been able to drink anything for about 12 hours — every time I try to swallow it's agony.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild lightheadedness on standing and fatigue in the setting of reduced intake
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint at all?
Any lightheadedness when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do feel a bit dizzy when I stand up, and I'm really tired — I think it's because I haven't had anything to drink.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sores or ulceration in the genital area, and no eye redness, pain or visual disturbance
trigger_question_examples: Any sores anywhere else on your body, such as the genital area?
Any eye redness, pain or change in your vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — just my mouth. No sores down below and my eyes are fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fluid-filled blisters, no history of cold sores or lip blisters
trigger_question_examples: Any blisters, or a tingling before the ulcers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters that I noticed, and I don't get cold sores.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, and no rash or spots on the hands or feet
trigger_question_examples: Any rash or spots on your hands or feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I've noticed, and nothing on my hands or feet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one available to help or monitor if symptoms worsen
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone with you at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just me at home, there's no one else here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has taken over-the-counter paracetamol with minimal relief of the oral pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking paracetamol but it's barely helped at all.
